title: AsCEP19/AsCEP20 computational target-prioritization pipeline
description: Reproducible computational workflow and supporting materials for prioritizing AsCEP19-200 and AsCEP20-170 as candidate RNAi/SIGS fragments in Alternaria solani. The repository includes documented command recipes, reusable scripts, configuration templates, a functional demo workflow, and links between pipeline outputs and supplementary materials.
